title.en: The seventh floor of the Universal Tower.

content.en:
The seventh floor of the Universal Tower.

Ye Tian entered here, but this place was not like the Cosmos Tower in the Wanlong territorial waters, forcibly enveloping an area and fighting with a creature.

This seems to be the inner area of the Cosmos Tower.

Airplanes!

A figure was teleported in, and the other party's aura and face were completely obscured.

However, Ye Tian's copying talent shrouded the other party, and he found out the other party's talent and information, knowing which Heavenly Ancestor the other party was.

Xuhe Heavenly Ancestor!

"Hey, I was selected by the Huanyu Tower, I'm lucky, if I defeat you, I can get a little reward!" Xuhe Heavenly Ancestor looked at Ye Tian and said, "This Heavenly Ancestor, why don't you admit defeat, how about I share a little with you after I get the reward?"

"Are you being stupid for me?"

Ye Tian sneered.

If he defeats the other party, he can get the reward of the Universal Tower, and his authority will also increase, and the benefits he will get are unimaginable to the other party.

The other party's reward is not in his eyes.

"Otherwise, if you give me some treasures, I will admit defeat directly?"

Xuhe Tianzu changed his mind again.

There are no loopholes in the Huanyu Tower, and if the other party admits defeat, he probably won't be considered to have broken through.

After all, the Cosmos Tower's machine spirit was paying attention to this at the moment, so he wouldn't be so stupid as to do so.

"Let's shoot!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Seeing that Ye Tian was not fooled, Xuhe Heavenly Ancestor didn't say much and shot directly.

Swish!

Ye Tianyi pointed and directly killed the other party in seconds.

However, when the other party was about to fall, he was moved out by the Cosmos Tower, because he didn't really die.

"So weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Due to the cover of the Huanyu Tower, he couldn't observe the other party's cultivation realm, and thought that the other party's strength was okay, but the result was so weak, he was directly killed by him in seconds.

"It is estimated that it is only the cultivation of the three blood transformation realms!"

Ye Tian judged.

That's when the reward came.

The reward is a Saint Flame Golden Fruit, which can probably be worth tens of Ancient Gold, which is okay, after all, this is only a reward for the seventh layer.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came to the eighth floor of the Huanyu Tower.

The Heavenly Ancestor encountered at this level is roughly equivalent to the strength of the Heavenly Ancestor of the Blood Transformation Realm from three times to the Heavenly Ancestor of the Blood Transformation Realm of four times, and after encountering Ye Tian, he was also seconded by him.

After that, Ye Tian came to the ninth floor of the Huanyu Tower.

The strength of the Heavenly Ancestor at this level is equivalent to the strength of the top four Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and it was also killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

Tenth floor.

The strength of the Heavenly Ancestor at this level has reached the ordinary five Blood Transformation Realm combat power, and it is still not Ye Tian's opponent.

Layer 11.

The opponents at this level already possessed the top five Blood Transformation Realm combat power.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian fought with the other party for a long time, and even showed the ancient technique of the Ancient God and Demon Fist.

The two sides have been fighting for a long time, and they seem to be evenly matched.

However, it was difficult to recover from the damage caused to the opponent by the Ancient God and Demon Fist, so as time passed, the opponent's injuries became more and more serious.

In the end, that Heavenly Ancestor was defeated by Ye Tian.

After breaking through this layer, Ye Tian's rewards were much better.

"It's Taihao Bloodstone, this thing is worth about 60,000 ancient gold, Huanyu Tower is really willing to do it!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Then, he went to the twelfth floor.

But this time, he failed, because the opponent he met was the sixth-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, where was his opponent, he was defeated by the opponent in one move.

Just as he was about to leave the Cosmos Tower, the Cosmos Tower's evaluation of him came out.

【Interlocutor: Endless Heavenly Ancestor】

Cultivation: Three Blood Transformation Realms

Breaking Tower Floor: 11th Floor

Evaluation: Ancient Genius

"Ancient Genius!"

It was the first time Ye Tian knew about this evaluation.

He only knew that in the gap between the territorial waters, he was called a boundary-breaking genius before, and now this primeval-level genius should be above the boundary-breaking genius.

"I am a boundary-breaking genius myself, and I have practiced an ancient technique, so I have become an ancient-level genius. However, if you practice the art of primevality, you are not necessarily an ancient-level genius. If his foundation is not enough, even if he is lucky enough to practice an ancient technique, he can only be regarded as a top-notch boundary-breaking genius at most!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Becoming an primeval-level genius, his authority has also been greatly enhanced.

Soon, he knew what his authority was for.

First, he had three chances to save his life.

The Cosmos Tower's terrifying abilities can cover long areas with its power, and if you are in a desperate situation elsewhere, you can summon the Cosmos Tower to move you out of danger.

That's life-saving!

And he can use three such opportunities!

In addition to this permission, there is also trading permission.

The Cosmos Tower's machine spirits have built a cosmos space-time trading network, in which only cultivators are allowed to join and trade and chat, similar to the cosmos space-time network in the Wanlong territorial waters.

It's just that it's more advanced here.

And he has a high trading authority, for example, if he sells something, the Cosmos Space-Time Trading Network will push his items to countless Blood Transformation Realm cultivators.

If the authority is low, no Blood Transformation Realm cultivator will see anything to sell.

At the same time, if he needed something, the Universal Time and Space Trading Network would also remind him as soon as possible, and he would be able to buy it faster than other Blood Transformation Realms.

That's the benefit of high trading authority!

Of course, he could also access the information of the Blood Transformation Realm with low clearance.

Moreover, as an ancient-level genius, even if he broke through the twelfth and thirteenth layers of the Blood Transformation Realm, he was not qualified to check his information, unless the other party was also an ancient-level genius and the authority was still above him, so he could see his information.

But under normal circumstances, those primordial-level geniuses would not be bored enough to check his information, unless they knew who he was, they would investigate him.

"It just so happens that I'm short of resources, let's see if anyone sells resources in the Cosmos Space-Time Trading Network that will help me break through to the Four Blood Transformation Realms. "

Subsequently, he logged in to the Universal Space-Time Trading Network, and immediately used his trading authority to query the resources he needed.

Soon.

He found a very useful resource, but sold very little.

"Taiyuan Golden Water!"

This kind of resource is very small, but the grade is much higher than Long Jin's blood, even if it is useful for the five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

The price sold on the Cosmos Space-Time Trading Network is 2,000 Ancient Gold Drops, which is a terrifying price, and many Blood Transformation Realms can't afford it.

"A few more drops of Taiyuan gold water are missing!"

Seeing this, Ye Tian immediately sold the resources on his body, such as the rewards obtained from the Huanyu Tower, in exchange for Taigu Gold, and then came to buy these Taiyuan Gold Water.
